fato_historico: 1935: Switzerland: A Royal Dutch Airlines plane en route from Milan to Frankfurt crashes into a Swiss mountain, killing thirteen.
energia_do_dia: Today, you may feel an urge to ground yourself amidst life's unexpected transitions. Just as the mountain stands resilient despite the echoes of the past, your heart remains steady. It is a good time to appreciate the firm soil beneath your feet and nurture your inner peace with the gentleness of a four-leaf clover's grace.
frase_do_dia: Deep roots allow us to bloom even when the winds of change blow strongly.
significado_numero: A cycle of transformation leading to a new sense of stability.
conselho: Consider taking a slow walk in nature to center your vibrant spirit today.
